title: ポニー少女とオオカミ王子

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day as I walk to the movie theater, I spot
Mejiro Ryan in the area looking around
frantically.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeesh... Where's McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Aaaagh! T-Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Ryan trembles from the shock, some movie
ticket stubs fall from her hands. I quickly pick
them up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah! Wait, that's...
choice_data_list: "The Pony Girl and the Wolf Prince"?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I believe that's the title of the live-action version
of a popular romance manga...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Um! Uh, you see, these are just...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen is a fan of the director, you see! So I'm,
you know, gonna keep her company—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Apologies for being late! An errand took longer
than I anticipated...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You've read the manga several times in
anticipation, have you not? Come, let's hurry!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wait! McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Uh, anyway! I heard that this is a real classy
movie. Very artistic—and inspirational!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Right, McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Certainly... We can say that it is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: See! McQueen agrees with me!
choice_data_list: In that case, maybe I should see it too.
In that case, maybe I should see it too.
Isn't your movie about to start?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: See! McQueen agrees with me!
choice_data_list: In that case, maybe I should see it too.
In that case, maybe I should see it too.
Isn't your movie about to start?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, uh, that's...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ryan. Now is not the time to be making excuses.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wh-what do you m—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, please do Ryan the favor of taking a seat
separate from us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Mejiro McQueen's request, I get a seat a fair
distance from them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wowie! It really was as artistic and inspiring as
they said!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah, it was! And McQueen agrees with me!
Right?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pardon?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Yes, of course! Um... that final profession of
love, for instance!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Right, right! That scene was sooo good!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
When he said, "I'll never let you go," and then, as
their lips got closer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: It was so roma—I mean, inspiring! Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make a silent vow to never bring this up again to
let Mejiro Ryan save face.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah! You're right, we should hurry!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Phew... Thank goodness. I think my trainer bought it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Well, if that's what you think, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I end up watching a different movie. Afterward, I
exit the theater to find...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It was sooo good! Especially the scene at the end
where they reveal their love!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes, I understand. Now, do please compose
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: And then... you know! The... k-kissing scene!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I would have seen it if I wasn't busy trying to keep
you from jumping out of your chair...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Swoon! Oh my gosh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ryan, we should go! What if your trainer were to
come back and see you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, you're right. I can't let anyone see me like
this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
All right. Let's go get some tea and talk more
about the movie!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Very well. But only if we return by curfew.
Agreed?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching them from behind, I vow to myself to
never speak of this.
